content: Phase 1 POC: backend orders API + Mongo seed + repository adapter + quick verification
Phase 2: Update Tailwind config with DESIGN_SYSTEM tokens + load Google Fonts + Material Symbols in public/index.html
Phase 2: Build reusable components (Sidebar, TopBar, PageHeader, PillTabs, DataTable, StatusPill, CreateOrderDialog)
Phase 2: OrdersPage composition + theme provider + wire data
Phase 2: All 6 user stories covered in development
Phase 2: End-to-End Testing using Testing Agent
Phase 3: Hardening — loading/empty/error states, validation, docs for Firebase swap path
